title: Mr C Lewis v Merthyr Tydfil Leisure Trust Ltd (in creditors voluntary  liquidation) and Merthyr Tydfil County Borough Council: 1601135/2024
text:
Case Number: 1601135/2024 
 
 
 
EMPLOYMENT TRIBUNALS 
 
Claimant:   Mr C Lewis 
  
Respondent:  1. Merthyr Tydfil Leisure Trust Limited (in creditors voluntary 
liquidation),  2. Merthyr Tydfil County Borough Council 
 
 
 
JUDGMENT 
 
The claim is struck out. 
 
 
REASONS 
 
1. By a letter dated 19 August 2025 the Tribunal gave the claimant an 
opportunity to make representations or to request a hearing, as to why the 
claim should not be struck out because: 
 
• the claimant had not complied with the order of the Tribunal dated 20 May 
2025. 
 
2. The claimant has failed to make representations in writing, or has failed to 
make any sufficient representations, why this should not be done or to request 
a hearing. The claim is therefore struck out. 
 
 
Approved by: 
   
Employment Judge Moore 
   
                                          Date: 03 September 2025  
   
JUDGMENT SENT TO THE PARTIES ON   
   
 04 September 2025  
   
 Adam Holborn   
FOR THE TRIBUNAL OFFICE
